mcpUseProject.title: mcp-use Project
mcpUseProject.subtitle: Full-stack MCP framework - Connect any MCP server in 6 lines of code
mcpUseProject.description: mcp-use is a full-stack MCP framework that provides everything needed to build Model Context Protocol. Supports connecting MCP servers in 6 lines of code, with support for both Python and TypeScript.
mcpUseProject.mcpAgentsDesc: AI agents that can use tools and reason between steps
mcpUseProject.mcpClientsDesc: Connect any LLM to any MCP server
